tasks.name: Single Sign-On via LDAP/Active Directory
blockers: Requires LDAP server credentials and schema documentation
May need coordination with IT security for certificate pinning
tasks.notes: Proven integration pattern; similar project took 5 days including testing

tasks.name: Mobile Push Notification Delivery System
blockers: APNs certificates and FCM service account setup
Client SDK integration on mobile apps
tasks.notes: Two-way integration with iOS and Android; includes retry logic and delivery tracking

projects.name: BPO Process Optimization and Workflow Consolidation

blockers: Requires API documentation for all three legacy systems
tasks.notes: Nursing case: consolidating scheduling, EHR, and communications into single interface; significant UX work

tasks.name: Administrator Utilization and Efficiency Reporting Dashboard
blockers: Data warehouse must be available; schema needs confirmation
Real-time data requirements may require caching strategy
tasks.notes: Typically 2-week project including design, data pipeline, and UI implementation
